description_long: This is a thick, rectangular hardcover book with a deep maroon cover bordered by a thin blue line. The front cover features bold, stylized yellow-green text in a fantasy-inspired font, suggesting a magical or mystical theme. The book's pages are visible along the sides, appearing off-white and tightly bound, with a slight texture indicating a substantial volume. The spine is solid maroon with a blue vertical stripe, lacking any visible text or decorative elements. The cover is smooth and slightly glossy, giving it a polished, well-kept appearance. There are no visible illustrations or artwork on the cover aside from the text.
description: A thick, maroon hardcover book with a blue border and bold yellow-green fantasy-style text on the cover. The pages are off-white, and the cover is smooth and slightly glossy.
description_view_0: The front cover is fully visible, showing the maroon color, blue border, and prominent yellow-green text.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the side, displaying the maroon cover, blue border, and the layered off-white pages; the text is partially visible and rotated.
description_view_2: The back cover is visible, showing the maroon surface and blue border, with the yellow-green text seen in reverse orientation.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the book is shown, highlighting the maroon cover, blue border, and the solid blue stripe on the spine.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is maroon with a vertical blue stripe and does not display any text or decorative elements. The design is simple and unadorned.
